title: Mildly Buttery Indian Chicken Korma
description: A kid-friendly Indian dish featuring chicken in a mildly spicy and buttery sauce, made with white masarepa and shio-cure for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the saucepan and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the saucepan and set aside.
In the same saucepan, add the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Add the white masarepa and shio-cure to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Add the yogurt, garam masala, cumin powder, and salt to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the shredded mozzarella cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked chicken back to the saucepan and stir to coat with the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
